zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Moleyns於1374年出生在英國英格蘭素可阿盧德爾時，她的父親William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns44歲，母親Margery Bacon38歲。她於1393年8月與Robert Thomas Morley在英國諾福爾可摩利 聖 彼得結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1408年在英國素瑞韋斯特 霍斯利享年34歲。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Moleyns was born in 1374, in Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns, was 44 and her mother, Margery Bacon, was 38. She married Robert Thomas Morley in August 1393, in Morley St Peter, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1408, in West Horsley, Surrey, England, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Moleyns est née en 1374, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margery Bacon, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Thomas Morley en août 1393, à Morley St Peter, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1408, à West Horsley, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Moleyns 1374 in Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns 44 und ihre Mutter Margery Bacon 38. Sie hat im August 1393 in Morley St Peter, Norfolk, England Robert Thomas Morley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1408 im Alter von 34 Jahren in West Horsley, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Moleynsが1374年にイギリスイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父William de Moleyns Lord Moleynsは44歳，母Margery Baconは38歳であった。1393年8月にイギリスノーフォルクモーリー スト ペターでRobert Thomas Morleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1408年にイギリススリーウエスト ホールスリーで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Moleyns(이)가 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Bacon(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1393년 8월 영국 노르폴크 모를리 스트 피터에서 Robert Thomas Morley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1408년 영국 수리 웨스트 호르슬리에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Robert Thomas Morley em agosto de 1393, em Morley St Peter, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Moleyns родилась в 1374 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Moleyns Lord Moleyns было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Bacon, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Thomas Morley август 1393 г. в местности морли ст питир, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1408 г. в местности вест хаурсли, сурри, Англия в возрасте 34 лет.
